name: PER_PAY_SCALES_VL
query: SELECT pps.pay_scale_id, pps.set_id, pps.business_group_id, pst.name, pps.attribute_category, pps.attribute1, pps.attribute2, pps.attribute3, pps.attribute4, pps.attribute5, pps.attribute6, pps.attribute7, pps.attribute8, pps.attribute9, pps.attribute10, pps.attribute11, pps.attribute12, pps.attribute13, pps.attribute14, pps.attribute15, pps.attribute16, pps.attribute17, pps.attribute18, pps.attribute19, pps.attribute20, pps.attribute21, pps.attribute22, pps.attribute23, pps.attribute24, pps.attribute25, pps.attribute26, pps.attribute27, pps.attribute28, pps.attribute29, pps.attribute30, pps.object_version_number, pps.created_by, pps.creation_date, pps.last_updated_by, pps.last_update_date, pps.last_update_login from PER_PAY_SCALES PPS , PER_PAY_SCALES_TL PST WHERE pps.pay_scale_id=pst.pay_scale_id AND pst.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV','LANG')
